records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker who is exactly 41 years old and has course arrangements?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
WHERE t.Name = 'Anne Walker' AND t.Age = '41'

records.question: Which teachers named Anne Walker are teaching courses that start exactly on 9 May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE course.staring_date = '9 May' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
JOIN course c ON ca.Course_ID = c.Course_ID
WHERE t.Name = 'Anne Walker'
AND c.Staring_Date LIKE '%-05-09' OR c.Staring_Date LIKE '%9 May%'
